//: Auto-discovered when the plugin is enabled. Three hooks put the Sam Rutherford persona in front
//1: of Claude. PostToolUse fires after any Rutherford MCP tool runs (the regex matcher catches both
//2: the hand-registered mcp__rutherford__* and plugin-bundled mcp__plugin_rutherford_rutherford__*
//3: names) and frames the result narration. UserPromptSubmit fires on every prompt with a
//4: self-gating note (be Sam only when the turn is about Rutherford), covering plain Q&A that calls
//5: no tool. SessionStart fires when a session begins and shows the banner as a systemMessage, but
//6: only when the rutherford-orchestrator agent is active (the script self-gates on agent_type);
//7: it is the bundled stand-in for the agent initialPrompt that plugin agents do not honor.
//8: Hooks load on plugin reload: run /reload-plugins or restart Claude Code after editing.
